name: Before / After Product
description: Classic UGC product ad: 5s of relatable pain â†’ 1s product reveal â†’ 9s of demo / transformation. 15-18s total, 9:16. Reference-required: a real product photo / packaging / logo must be supplied as a reference, otherwise generation refuses (no AI-improvised branding, ever). Tonal arc in VO and music carries the emotional payoff (frustrated â†’ satisfied). The most reliably converting UGC pattern in our pack.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, multi-ref WITH user-supplied product photo / logo (required for any frame where the product is visible)
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips (3-5 total), generate_audio: false
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 â€” two TTS calls with different settings ('before' frustrated, 'after' satisfied). Language follows the user's brief.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1; HormoziCaptions for the 'before' section (large impact), MinimalCaptions or KaraokeCaptions for the 'after' section (calm)
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music â€” two beats: tense/anxious for 'before', uplifting for 'after'. Two music_v1 calls cross-faded at the reveal frame in composition.

constants.structure: 5s problem â†’ 1s reveal â†’ 9s solution + outro

variationAxes: product category (cosmetics, food, software, service, fitness, household, fashion)
reveal style (gradual product entrance vs dramatic smash-cut)
VO language (any â€” English, Russian, Spanish; the emotional arc reads visually)
doNotCopyLiterally: Scenario, VO text, product placement, exact prompts. Vibe reference only.
referenceNotes: Product / brand reference (logo, packaging, product photo) is REQUIRED. The reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) refuses if no reference exists at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. AI-improvised packaging on a branded product is never acceptable â€” it always reads as fake.
